title: The ONLY 6 Skills You Need to 10x Your Claude Projects
summary: Austin Marchese presents six Claude skills organized as a compound workflow: web scraping for data discovery, /ingest-source for knowledge capture, /improve-system for iterative refinement, /ask-the-board for advisor consultation, /internal-focus-group for testing, and compound engineering for shipping. The methodology is demonstrated through building a fitness trainer project.
